title: Assistant Housing Support Worker
description: ASSISTANT SUPPORT WORKER - FEMALE SERVICE (ONLY FEMALE WORKERS). Ashberry Recruitment are currently hiring female housing support workers in the South Yorkshire area to work for a well established organisation that prevents homelessness. The role involves assisting with delivery of high-quality support programmes, engaging with residents, undertaking welfare checks, administrative duties, maintaining safety, and supporting clients to achieve positive life changes and independence.
summary:
Female housing support role in Sheffield focused on homelessness prevention and client independence.
Includes welfare checks, admin and front-line support duties.

title: Support Worker
description: Helping others improve and turn their lives around is at the core of this role. Working within a large healthcare provider, you will support individuals across various settings, delivering care and assisting with daily activities. The role includes working a 42-hour rota covering days, nights, and weekends, ensuring consistent and high-quality support delivery.
summary:
Sheffield-based support worker role within a large care provider on a 42-hour rota.
Covers day, night and weekend shifts delivering consistent care.

title: SEMH Support Worker
description: This SEMH support role involves working with young people experiencing social, emotional and mental health challenges. You will provide one-to-one and small group support, help manage behaviour, and support engagement in education. The role requires strong communication, behaviour management skills, and experience working with vulnerable young people.
summary:
Doncaster SEMH support role working with young people in education settings.
Focus on behaviour management and emotional support.

title: Bank Support Worker
description: As a bank support worker, you will provide flexible care and support to individuals with varying needs. Responsibilities include assisting with daily living, promoting independence, supporting community engagement, and ensuring a safe environment. This role offers flexibility across shifts and requires a person-centred approach.
summary:
Flexible bank support role in Doncaster assisting with daily living and independence.
Covers varied shifts with a person-centred approach.

title: Care Support Worker
description: Care support workers provide day-to-day assistance to individuals in supported living environments. Duties include personal care, supporting daily routines, encouraging independence, and maintaining a safe and supportive environment. The role involves working as part of a team and engaging with service users to improve quality of life.
summary:
Doncaster care support role delivering daily living assistance and personal care.
Focus on independence and quality of life improvements.

title: Health Support Worker
description: This role involves supporting individuals with health and care needs in a structured environment. Responsibilities include assisting with personal care, monitoring wellbeing, supporting treatment plans, and maintaining accurate records. You will work closely with healthcare professionals and support teams to deliver consistent care.
summary:
Doncaster health support role assisting with care plans and wellbeing monitoring.
Works alongside healthcare teams in structured settings.

title: SEMH Support Worker
description: SEMH support workers in Barnsley provide targeted support to students with behavioural and emotional needs. The role includes one-to-one support, behaviour management, classroom assistance, and promoting engagement in learning. Strong interpersonal skills and resilience are essential.
summary:
Barnsley SEMH support role focused on behavioural and emotional support in education.
Includes 1:1 support and classroom engagement.

title: Experienced Agency Support Workers
description: Agency support workers provide staffing cover across a range of healthcare and residential settings. The role requires prior experience and the ability to adapt quickly to different environments, supporting service users with varying needs and ensuring continuity of care.
summary:
Barnsley agency support role covering multiple care and residential settings.
Requires experience and adaptability across environments.
